title: 7 Herbal Tinctures For Overactive Bladder
description: Urtica dioica tinctures contains the bioactive constituents histamine, quercetin, and amentoflavone. These compounds have anti-inflammatory properties, which help to soothe the bladder and reduce irritation. Histamine also has a stimulating effect on the bladder, increasing its ability to store urine and reducing the need to urinate frequently.
